best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-report_33-012 title: verify suggestions screen display with empty data module: suggestions source pages: 4 preconditions: application is running. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. navigate to the map screen. 3. tap on the "button for suggestions". 4. observe the suggestions screen. expected result: the suggestions screen should display a message indicating no data available.
